content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 14, 2005

Art Chen, Senior Vice President
Foundation for California Community Colleges
1102 Q Street, Third Floor
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-265

Dear Mr. Chen:

This letter is in response to your request on behalf of Robin J. Dezember for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 We are unable to respond to your request for advice since information is still required even after talking to you and your representative, leaving voicemail messages and sending and receiving additional correspondence on:

• January 24, 2005,
• February 16, 2005,
• February 17, 2005,
• February 22, 2005, and
• March 2, 2005.

For example, in order to determine Mr. Dezember's duties under the Act, first it is necessary to determine if the Foundation for California Community Colleges is a state or local agency under the Act since the Act is only applicable to public officials. Please review the enclosed letters regarding educational auxiliary organizations to assist you in making this determination.

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660 or resubmit your request for advice once you have gathered all of the facts necessary to make this determination.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosures
GW:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-265
